programme.title: Moonshiners 11
programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Moonshiners 11
programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make a choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: For Martyna Wojciechowska, the most important value is freedom.During her travels in the ninth season of the program, she decided to show what she means to others - her characters.Malaysian fish people have cut themselves off from civilization.The Kazakh girl breaks all stereotypes and excels in activities reserved only for men.Pakistani Masarrat Misbah, thanks to her courage, is changing the world, restoring freedom to others.Kalashka Iran Bibi lives according to the centuries-old tradition of his ancestors despite external pressures.In Japan, Martyna Wojciechowska found people free from any prejudices.However, sometimes honest conversations bring further questions - about the price that Bolivian cholitas pay for their independence;about whether jihadist mothers could limit the freedom of their children, and whether Mennonites are making the right choice by consciously deciding on a life limited by rigid rules.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will address the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations. For years, the Iban people living in Borneo were considered one of the most terrifying communities in the world.Its members carried out ritual hunts for people.They believed that a warrior who shed blood gained strength and glory.Nowadays, this tradition is no longer cultivated, but its traces still remain in Iban homes.They never got rid of the trophies they won years ago.Martyna Wojciechowska talks to a descendant of bounty hunters.He also takes part in the skull taming ritual.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations. Martyna Wojciechowska talks to Morena Herrera, who fights for women's rights in El Salvador.The country ranks first in terms of the number of murders of women.About 500 such cases are reported annually, with a population of less than 3 million.More than half of the victims of violence do not seek help and do not reveal the truth even to their closest family members.Moreover, El Salvador has one of the most restrictive anti-abortion laws in the world.Termination of pregnancy is always illegal.If a woman loses a child in unclear circumstances, she immediately becomes a suspect.The penalty for her ranges from 2 to 8 years, and if found guilty, she may be imprisoned for 50 years.A doctor can be sentenced to 6 to 12 years for performing an abortion.Anyone who knew about the situation but did not inform the authorities is also complicit.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places There is a place in downtown Los Angeles that tourists and locals alike stay away from.Tens of thousands of people who have become homeless camp every day in the Skid Row district.Pastor Troy runs a center that helps people in crisis of homelessness get back on their feet.Marcin learns the story of a priest who also struggled with a serious life crisis and now devotes all his energy to supporting others.The leader continues his journey to Slab City, a settlement located on the site of a former military base inhabited by those who want to live on their own terms.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places Marcin will meet with Carrie, a representative of the Mormon community, to find out what their faith is based on.This church was founded in 1830, and its followers, fleeing from persecution, settled in Utah and founded the city of Salt Lake City.The guide will also take the leader to meet his family.This will be an opportunity to find out whether the controversies that have been stirring up the lifestyle of followers of this religion for years and the myths circulating about it are confirmed in reality.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places Marcin Prokop will meet a man who gave up the pursuit of a career and money in favor of a sense of freedom and communion with nature.An American Air Force pilot gave up everything to live in a small truck and constantly travel.The host talks to him about where this idea came from and whether he regrets it.The journalist will also reach Zion National Park.Kim, who works as a guide in this place, will tell Marcin about what being close to nature gives him and why he is guided by the wabi-sabi philosophy.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places The presenter goes to Denver to meet with representatives of the Soldiers of Jesus.They say about themselves that they exist to train faithful disciples, preach the word of God and bear witness to the Gospel among the motorcyclist community.One of the members of the organization, Smoking Mike, tells Marcin about his dark past and the path he had to take to finally find peace and happiness.The leader continues his journey to meet Amberley, who suffered a spinal injury several years earlier as a result of an accident and uses a wheelchair.Thanks to her passion and religion, she found the strength to put her life back together.She is still an active rodeo competitor and horses are her great love.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will address the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations. For years, the Iban people living in Borneo were considered one of the most terrifying communities in the world.Its members carried out ritual hunts for people.They believed that a warrior who shed blood gained strength and glory.Nowadays, this tradition is no longer cultivated, but its traces still remain in Iban homes.They never got rid of the trophies they won years ago.Martyna Wojciechowska talks to a descendant of bounty hunters.He also takes part in the skull taming ritual.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska has been wandering the world for many years and looking for interesting people who share their unique stories with her.The traveler not only talks about their everyday lives, but also raises important social issues.In the tenth season of the program he will visit, among others:Spitsbergen - the largest island of the Svalbard archipelago, where it is night for a quarter of the year.He will also reach out to the Wodaabe community living in Chad, and in El Salvador he will tackle the difficult issue of restrictive anti-abortion regulations. Martyna Wojciechowska talks to Morena Herrera, who fights for women's rights in El Salvador.The country ranks first in terms of the number of murders of women.About 500 such cases are reported annually, with a population of less than 3 million.More than half of the victims of violence do not seek help and do not reveal the truth even to their closest family members.Moreover, El Salvador has one of the most restrictive anti-abortion laws in the world.Termination of pregnancy is always illegal.If a woman loses a child in unclear circumstances, she immediately becomes a suspect.The penalty for her ranges from 2 to 8 years, and if found guilty, she may be imprisoned for 50 years.A doctor can be sentenced to 6 to 12 years for performing an abortion.Anyone who knew about the situation but did not inform the authorities is also complicit.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: More than 170,000 members of this tribe live on the Navajo Nation reservation.The picturesque areas located in four states were supposed to be an enclave of free Indians.In fact, they often resemble vast ghettos.The history of the Navajo is rich and painful, as Marcin Prokop discovers during a visit to one of the last living cryptographers from this tribe, who fought in the Pacific during World War II.The next hero is Loren Anthony, who grew up in the mountains, living in primitive conditions.As a teenager, he formed a metal band, which allowed him to express generational frustrations.After various life challenges, Loren decided to focus on music, charity work and supporting his community.For many young residents of the reserve, this type of creativity is a way to shout out wrongs and escape from the sad reality.Navajos fight stereotypes, valuing the value of their community and traditions, which encourages them to remain in the difficult areas of the reservation.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: A three-day UFO festival takes place every year in a small town in Pennsylvania, attracting extraterrestrial civilization enthusiasts from all over America.This place is not accidental, because most reports of encounters with aliens are reported in this area.Although interest in UFOs appears to be waning in favor of technology and artificial intelligence threats, extraterrestrial enthusiasts remain active.They are organizing and writing petitions to the government asking for the disclosure of secret files.Although UFOs are most often associated with Roswell and Area 51, the center of this phenomenon is currently located in a provincial town near Pittsburgh and in Washington state.Marcin Prokop intends to meet with UFO enthusiasts and researchers to assess the evidence for the existence of cryptids and extraterrestrial civilizations.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity to combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity to combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity to combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programme.desc: After a sudden increase in alarm calls in Morgan City, the city's mayor and police chief recruit a team of paranormal experts to investigate supernatural activity.

credits.actor: Teen victim of yellow fever - Sophia Sluyter

programme.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programme.desc: After a sudden increase in alarm calls in Morgan City, the city's mayor and police chief recruit a team of paranormal experts to investigate supernatural activity.

credits.actor: Teen victim of yellow fever - Sophia Sluyter

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity In Zanzibar, Martyna Wojciechowska visits two women who share a husband.This country is a stronghold of radical Islam.According to the Quran, a man has the right to polygamy, but he must provide a decent living for all his spouses and divide his time fairly between them.Wache Musa, 25, has been married since she was fifteen.She has four children and works as a cleaner in a private house.The younger Mariam has been married for half a year and has a three-month-old child.He performs tedious work on a plantation of algae intended for food and the production of beauty masks.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity Martyna Wojciechowska goes to Jordan to see how local women live.It turns out that - unlike other Arab women - they are independent, study and run their own companies.At the same time, they do not cut themselves off from tradition.Many of them wear hijab - a scarf covering their hair and shoulders.However, they do not agree to remain in the shadow of men and fight for their rights.The country is ruled by King Abdullah II, whose progressive wife Rania combines ancient customs with modernity.He is a role model for most Jordanian women.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: More than 170,000 members of this tribe live on the Navajo Nation reservation.The picturesque areas located in four states were supposed to be an enclave of free Indians.In fact, they often resemble vast ghettos.The history of the Navajo is rich and painful, as Marcin Prokop discovers during a visit to one of the last living cryptographers from this tribe, who fought in the Pacific during World War II.The next hero is Loren Anthony, who grew up in the mountains, living in primitive conditions.As a teenager, he formed a metal band, which allowed him to express generational frustrations.After various life challenges, Loren decided to focus on music, charity work and supporting his community.For many young residents of the reserve, this type of creativity is a way to shout out wrongs and escape from the sad reality.Navajos fight stereotypes, valuing the value of their community and traditions, which encourages them to remain in the difficult areas of the reservation.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: A three-day UFO festival takes place every year in a small town in Pennsylvania, attracting extraterrestrial civilization enthusiasts from all over America.This place is not accidental, because most reports of encounters with aliens are reported in this area.Although interest in UFOs appears to be waning in favor of technology and artificial intelligence threats, extraterrestrial enthusiasts remain active.They are organizing and writing petitions to the government asking for the disclosure of secret files.Although UFOs are most often associated with Roswell and Area 51, the center of this phenomenon is currently located in a provincial town near Pittsburgh and in Washington state.Marcin Prokop intends to meet with UFO enthusiasts and researchers to assess the evidence for the existence of cryptids and extraterrestrial civilizations.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 3
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 3
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 3
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 3
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits unusual houses, located in charming natural surroundings.The host will watch, among others:Dutch houses, barges, trailers, and houses made of containers.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits unusual houses, located in charming natural surroundings.The host will watch, among others:Dutch houses, barges, trailers, and houses made of containers.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska this time visits Dominika, who lives in a chyża, a wooden single-building farm.However, the building had to be dismantled and transported to a town 10 km away from Hańczowa.The host also meets Tatiana and her family, who moved to a wooden house, the structure of which allowed the household members to add additional modules.Meanwhile, Mateusz has always dreamed of owning a property that he would be able to travel freely.So he decided to design a mobile home.

programme.title: Unobvious places
programme.desc: Katarzyna Jaroszyńska visits unusual houses, located in charming natural surroundings.The host will watch, among others:Dutch houses, barges, trailers, and houses made of containers.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: Each country has its own traditional dishes.Unusual dishes include:baked bats or bee larvae in honey.Jarosław Nowak gets to know the strangest cuisines in the world.

programme.title: A journey into the unknown: Following the Yeti
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets out to find the yeti, the legendary half-man, half-ape that lives high in the Himalayas.During this expedition, the traveler talks to world-famous researchers.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places There is a place in downtown Los Angeles that tourists and locals alike stay away from.Tens of thousands of people who have become homeless camp every day in the Skid Row district.Pastor Troy runs a center that helps people in crisis of homelessness get back on their feet.Marcin learns the story of a priest who also struggled with a serious life crisis and now devotes all his energy to supporting others.The leader continues his journey to Slab City, a settlement located on the site of a former military base inhabited by those who want to live on their own terms.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places Marcin will meet with Carrie, a representative of the Mormon community, to find out what their faith is based on.This church was founded in 1830, and its followers, fleeing from persecution, settled in Utah and founded the city of Salt Lake City.The guide will also take the leader to meet his family.This will be an opportunity to find out whether the controversies that have been stirring up the lifestyle of followers of this religion for years and the myths circulating about it are confirmed in reality.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places Marcin Prokop will meet a man who gave up the pursuit of a career and money in favor of a sense of freedom and communion with nature.An American Air Force pilot gave up everything to live in a small truck and constantly travel.The host talks to him about where this idea came from and whether he regrets it.The journalist will also reach Zion National Park.Kim, who works as a guide in this place, will tell Marcin about what being close to nature gives him and why he is guided by the wabi-sabi philosophy.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places The presenter goes to Denver to meet with representatives of the Soldiers of Jesus.They say about themselves that they exist to train faithful disciples, preach the word of God and bear witness to the Gospel among the motorcyclist community.One of the members of the organization, Smoking Mike, tells Marcin about his dark past and the path he had to take to finally find peace and happiness.The leader continues his journey to meet Amberley, who suffered a spinal injury several years earlier as a result of an accident and uses a wheelchair.Thanks to her passion and religion, she found the strength to put her life back together.She is still an active rodeo competitor and horses are her great love.

programme.title: Secrets of the wrecks of the Baltic Sea
programme.desc: One German ship sunk, several damaged - this was the effect of the Polish fleet in September 1939.The losses are the result of an erroneous strategy of the staff of Commander Aleksander Mohuczy, commander of the submarine division.As a result, crews had to fight for their own survival instead of focusing on destroying enemy forces.The episode is devoted to the faulty tactical plan of the Polish Navy and the story of the only success of Polish ships during the September Campaign - the installation of minefields by ORP Żbik to protect the coast, on which the enemy minesweeper M-85 sank, losing 24 of the 51 crew members.For almost 74 years, the location of the wreck was unknown.

programme.title: Secrets of the wrecks of the Baltic Sea
programme.desc: A team of divers is combing the bottom of the Baltic Sea in search of sunken ships.Witnesses of the events, historians and documentarians discover their history and look for answers to troubling questions.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.
